title: Career Opportunity Software Engineer at MakeMyTrip Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Software Engineer at MakeMyTrip Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
MakeMyTrip Consulting Pvt Ltd has an exciting opening for a Software Engineer at our Varanasi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About MakeMyTrip Consulting Pvt Ltd:
MakeMyTrip Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MakeMyTrip Consulting Pvt Ltd!
